title: Next Frontier
scientificQuestion: Can bounded formal candidate generation produce a nontrivial conjecture candidate that survives known-pattern filters, counterexample search, exhaustive bounds, holdouts, proof-sketch pressure, and replay?
humanReadableSummary: Selected next frontier: expand formal discovery with richer nontrivial generators and stronger known-pattern lookup before switching domains. Einstein-path score held at 61 because no candidate survived.
disclaimer: Bounded computational formal result only. It reports finite tests and failure modes, not a checked proof, open-problem solution, broad discovery claim, outside-party review, or general law.
